unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

function.name: cf_hc_baller_reset
cf_hc_baller_is_active
cf_hc_baller_has_started
cf_hc_baller_reply_ms
cf_hc_baller_data_pending
cf_hc_baller_init
function.parameter_list: (struct cf_hc_baller *b, struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, const char *name, int transport)

function.name: cf_hc_baller_connect
function.parameter_list: (struct cf_hc_baller *b, struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, bool *done)

function.name: cf_hc_reset
baller_connected
time_to_start_h21
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct curltime now)

function.name: cf_hc_connect
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, bool blocking, bool *done)

function.name: cf_hc_adjust_pollset
cf_hc_data_pending
cf_get_max_baller_time
cf_hc_query
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, int query, int *pres1, void *pres2)

function.name: cf_hc_close
cf_hc_destroy

unit.decl_stmt: struct Curl_cftype Curl_cft_http_connect = { "HTTPS-CONNECT", 0, CURL_LOG_LVL_NONE, cf_hc_destroy, cf_hc_connect, cf_hc_close, Curl_cf_def_get_host, cf_hc_adjust_pollset, cf_hc_data_pending, Curl_cf_def_send, Curl_cf_def_recv, Curl_cf_def_cntrl, Curl_cf_def_conn_is_alive, Curl_cf_def_conn_keep_alive, cf_hc_query, };

function.name: cf_hc_create
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter **pcf, struct Curl_easy *data, const struct Curl_dns_entry *remotehost, bool try_h3, bool try_h21)

function.name: cf_http_connect_add
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, int sockindex, const struct Curl_dns_entry *remotehost, bool try_h3, bool try_h21)

function.name: Curl_cf_https_setup
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, int sockindex, const struct Curl_dns_entry *remotehost)
